label: Calcium
target: ~500 mg per 454g (1 lb) of meat, OR 9–15 mg per kcal

sources.label: Ground eggshell
sources.dose: ½ tsp per 1 lb meat (1 large eggshell ≈ 2000 mg Ca)

sources.label: Bone meal (food grade)
sources.dose: ½ tsp per 1 lb meat (verify lead-free)

label: Omega-3 (EPA + DHA)
target: ~300 mg combined EPA+DHA per 9–13 kg body weight on non-fish days

sources.label: Fish oil
sources.dose: Varies by concentration — store refrigerated, replace every 2 months once opened

sources.label: Sardines (whole, in water)
sources.dose: 1 sardine per 10 lb body weight, 2–3× weekly

sources.label: Cod liver oil
sources.dose: Contains Vit A & D too — don't double-dose

sources.label: Cod liver oil or supplement
sources.dose: Per label — do not exceed 3000 IU/kg DM
